nav-get-started: Main navigation item for the get started (home) page.
nav-learn: Main navigation item for the learn page.
nav-about: Main navigation item for about page.
nav-api: Main navigation item for explorer page.
nav-enterprise: Main navigation item for the enterprise page.
nav-community: Main navigation item for the community page.
nav-contribute: Main navigation item for the contribute page.
nav-get-help: Main navigation item for the get help page.
nav-primary-label: Accessible name for the primary site navigation region in the left page grid column.
nav-utility-label: Accessible name for the utility navigation region in the right page grid column.
header-search-placeholder: Placeholder text for the header search field prototype.
header-search-button-label: Accessible label for the collapsed header search icon button.
header-settings-label: Accessible label for the header settings button prototype.
header-login-label: Header link to the login page when the user is not signed in (prototype).
login-page-title: Heading for the developer login page.
login-username-label: Label for the username field on the login page.
login-password-label: Label for the password field on the login page.
login-keep-logged-in: Label for the keep-me-logged-in checkbox on the login page.
login-submit-button: Submit button label on the login page.
login-help-link: Prototype link for login help documentation.
login-no-account-prompt: Prompt text before the create-account link on the login page.
login-create-account-link: Prototype link for account creation on the login page.
login-page-links-label: Accessible name for the login page auxiliary links region.
interface-language-label: Label for the interface language selector in the top header.
interface-language-placeholder: Placeholder text for the interface language selector with no selected value.
interface-language-en: Option label for English in the interface language selector.
interface-language-es: Option label for Spanish in the interface language selector.
interface-language-fr: Option label for French in the interface language selector.
interface-language-he: Option label for Hebrew in the interface language selector.
interface-language-fa: Option label for Persian in the interface language selector.
explorer-title: Heading for the API explorer page.
explorer-description: Short instruction text under explorer heading.
explorer-instance-label: Label for the wiki instance selector.
explorer-api-modules-title: Heading for the right-hand API modules navigation panel.
explorer-browse-api-modules-before: Text before the wiki project name in the browse modules panel title (includes trailing space).
explorer-browse-api-modules-after: Text after the wiki project name in the browse modules panel title (includes leading space).
explorer-opt-in-label: Legend for the opt-in checkbox group beside the wiki project selector.
explorer-opt-in-beta-endpoints: Checkbox label for including beta REST endpoints.
explorer-opt-in-internal-endpoints: Checkbox label for including internal REST endpoints.
explorer-wiki-project-label: Label for the wiki project selector in the API modules panel.
explorer-wiki-project-help: Help text for the wiki project selector in the API modules panel.
explorer-module-rail-title: Heading for the desktop module sidebar.
explorer-endpoint-fallback: Fallback endpoint label when an operation has no summary in the API modules panel.
explorer-module-unavailable: Shown when a module or endpoint is unavailable for the selected wiki project.
explorer-module-beta-chip-label: Label on the warning InfoChip when a REST module title includes a beta marker.
section-nav-overview: Placeholder link for a section landing page in the left navigation.
section-nav-get-started-label: Accessible name for the Get started left-hand section navigation.
section-nav-get-started-title: Section heading for introductory Get started links.
section-nav-get-started-introduction: Placeholder link for the Get started introduction page.
section-nav-get-started-learn-about-wiki: Placeholder link for learning about Wikimedia projects.
Placeholder link for learning about Wikimedia technology.
section-nav-get-started-build-for-wikime: Section heading for community builder pathways.
section-nav-get-started-on-wiki-features: Placeholder link for on-wiki features documentation.
section-nav-get-started-tools-and-bots: Placeholder link for tools and bots documentation.
section-nav-get-started-use-wiki-content: Placeholder link for using wiki content.
section-nav-get-started-access-open-data: Placeholder link for accessing open data.
section-nav-get-started-mediawiki-and-ex: Placeholder link for MediaWiki and extensions.
section-nav-get-started-build-for-commer: Section heading for commercial use case pathways.
section-nav-get-started-content-reuse: Placeholder link for content reuse documentation.
section-nav-get-started-embedded-learnin: Placeholder link for embedded learning documentation.
section-nav-get-started-commercial-decis: Placeholder link for commercial decision making documentation.
section-nav-get-started-use-wikimedia-da: Section heading for research use cases.
section-nav-get-started-study-wikimedia-: Placeholder link for studying Wikimedia communities.
section-nav-get-started-data-for-academi: Placeholder link for academic research data.
section-nav-learn-label: Accessible name for the Learn left-hand section navigation.
section-nav-learn-title: Section heading for Learn section links.
section-nav-learn-get-started-link: Placeholder link to the Get started landing page from Learn navigation.
section-nav-learn-reuse-wikimedia-conten: Placeholder link for reusing Wikimedia content guide.
section-nav-learn-login-with-wikimedia: Placeholder link for logging in with Wikimedia guide.
section-nav-learn-browse-all-guides: Placeholder link to browse all guides.
section-nav-learn-display-holidays-from-: Placeholder link for a holidays tutorial.
section-nav-learn-reuse-media-files: Placeholder link for a media reuse tutorial.
section-nav-learn-compare-page-metrics: Placeholder link for a page metrics tutorial.
section-nav-learn-browse-all-tutorials: Placeholder link to browse all tutorials.
section-nav-learn-page-views: Placeholder link for page views concept documentation.
section-nav-learn-unique-devices: Placeholder link for unique devices concept documentation.
section-nav-learn-machine-learning-model: Placeholder link for machine learning models concept documentation.
section-nav-learn-browse-all-concepts: Placeholder link to browse all concepts.
section-nav-learn-terms-of-use: Placeholder link for terms of use policy.
section-nav-learn-browse-all-policies: Placeholder link to browse all policies.
section-nav-enterprise-label: Accessible name for the Enterprise left-hand section navigation.
section-nav-community-label: Accessible name for the Community left-hand section navigation.
section-nav-community-explore-hackathons: Placeholder link for hackathons and events.
section-nav-community-communicate-with-t: Placeholder link for communicating with the tech community.
section-nav-community-learn-and-share-te: Placeholder link for learning and sharing technical skills.
section-nav-community-get-tech-project-u: Placeholder link for tech project updates.
section-nav-community-learn-about-wikime: Placeholder link for Wikimedia technical operations.
section-nav-contribute-label: Accessible name for the Contribute left-hand section navigation.
section-nav-contribute-title: Section heading for Wikimedia open source contribution links.
section-nav-contribute-wikimedia-open-so: Placeholder link for Wikimedia open source overview.
section-nav-contribute-learn-how-contrib: Placeholder link for how contributing works.
section-nav-contribute-contribute-by-top: Placeholder link for contributing by topic.
section-nav-contribute-contribute-by-pro: Placeholder link for contributing by programming language.
section-nav-contribute-search-all-projec: Placeholder link to search all projects.
section-nav-contribute-developer-portal-: Section heading for Developer portal contribution links.
section-nav-contribute-contribute-code: Placeholder link for contributing code to the developer portal.
section-nav-contribute-write-a-guide: Placeholder link for writing a guide.
section-nav-get-help-label: Accessible name for the Get help left-hand section navigation.
section-nav-get-help-title: Section heading for Get help links.
section-nav-get-help-troubleshooting-gui: Placeholder link for the troubleshooting guide.
section-nav-about-label: Accessible name for the About left-hand section navigation.
explorer-side-nav-label: Accessible name for the API Explorer left-hand section navigation.
explorer-side-nav-api-explorer-title: Section heading for API Explorer links in the left navigation.
explorer-side-nav-wikimedia-api-modules: Link label for the Wikimedia API modules section (current page).
explorer-side-nav-overview-title: Section heading for overview documentation links in the left navigation.
explorer-side-nav-access-policy: Placeholder link for access policy documentation.
explorer-side-nav-rate-limits: Placeholder link for rate limits documentation.
explorer-side-nav-licensing-attribution: Placeholder link for licensing and attribution documentation.
explorer-side-nav-stability-policy: Placeholder link for stability policy documentation.
explorer-side-nav-libraries-sdks: Placeholder link for libraries and SDKs documentation.
explorer-side-nav-additional-apis-title: Section heading for additional API links in the left navigation.
explorer-side-nav-content-pages: Placeholder link for content and pages documentation.
explorer-module-rail-description: Help text that explains the desktop module accordion and the mobile module selector.
explorer-loading-modules: Shown while discovery modules are loading.
explorer-module-placeholder: Placeholder text for module selector with no selected value.
explorer-instance-placeholder: Placeholder text for instance selector with no selected value.
explorer-loading-interface: Shown while the Scalar explorer bundle is loading after the page chrome has rendered.
explorer-refresh-button: Button to retry discovery after failure.
explorer-empty-modules: Shown when discovery returns no modules.
explorer-no-selectable-modules: Shown when all discovered modules failed spec loading and none can be selected.
explorer-bootstrap-error: Shown when the aggregated explorer bootstrap request fails for the selected wiki instance.
explorer-loading-instance: Heading shown while replacing the explorer interface with an instance bootstrap loading state.
explorer-loading-instance-description: Loading-state text shown before the selected wiki display name while bootstrap is running.
explorer-failed-modules-label: Prefix label for a warning list of modules that failed spec loading during bootstrap.
explorer-scalar-switching: Desktop-only overlay text while switching Scalar to a newly selected module.
explorer-spec-missing: Shown when no module spec URL can be resolved.
explorer-endpoints-label: Plural label used next to the endpoint count in each module accordion summary.
explorer-endpoints-loading: Shown while the endpoint list for a module is loading.
explorer-endpoints-empty: Shown when a module spec resolves but contains no operations.
explorer-endpoints-error: Shown when the endpoint list for a module cannot be loaded.
explorer-selected-module-badge: Badge text displayed next to the module currently loaded into Scalar.
explorer-debug-empty: Shown when there are no diagnostics events recorded yet.
header-account-label: Deprecated visible label; header now shows the wiki username when signed in.
header-auth-link-aria: Accessible name for the header link when signed in; $1 is the wiki username (link goes to the account dashboard).
account-page-title-before: Text before the username in the account dashboard title (empty in English).
account-page-title-after: Text after the username in the account dashboard title (e.g. possessive suffix in English).
account-developer-tokens-heading: Section heading for personal developer tokens on the account page.
account-developer-tokens-description: Short introductory paragraph for the developer tokens section (what the section is for).
account-request-developer-token-guidance: Prose shown below the request link (subtle color); explains Meta-Wiki registration, approval, and revocation for personal tokens. Learn-more links are appended in the same paragraph via help-before/between/after messages.
account-request-developer-token-link: External link label to request a personal developer token on Wikimedia's Meta-Wiki.
account-developer-tokens-empty: Notice when no developer token rows are shown in the prototype list.
account-developer-tokens-table-caption: Accessible caption for the developer tokens table (legacy key).
account-developer-tokens-list-label: Accessible name for the developer tokens list (`aria-label` on ul).
account-meta-issued: Metadata label before the issued date on a token list item; include trailing punctuation appropriate for the locale.
account-meta-last-used: Metadata label before the last-used date on a token list item.
account-meta-registered: Metadata label before the registration date on an OAuth list item.
account-meta-grants: Metadata label before the grants summary on an OAuth list item.
account-oauth-tokens-heading: Section heading for OAuth application credentials.
account-oauth-tokens-description: Short introductory paragraph for the OAuth applications section (what the section is for).
account-request-oauth-application-guidan: Prose shown below the request link (subtle color); explains Meta-Wiki registration, approval, and public consumer list. Learn-more links are appended in the same paragraph via help-before/between/after messages.
account-request-oauth-application-link: External link label to propose a new OAuth 2.0 consumer on Wikimedia's Meta-Wiki.
account-oauth-tokens-empty: Notice when no OAuth consumer rows are shown.
account-oauth-tokens-table-caption: Accessible caption for the OAuth applications table (legacy key).
account-oauth-tokens-list-label: Accessible name for the OAuth applications list (`aria-label` on ul).
account-col-token-name: Table column header for token display name.
account-col-access-token: Table column header for the masked access token value.
account-reveal-secret-aria: Accessible name for the icon button that reveals a masked token.
account-hide-secret-aria: Accessible name for the icon button that hides a revealed token.
account-copy-secret-aria: Accessible name for the icon button that copies a token to the clipboard.
account-token-secret-actions-aria: Accessible name for the grouped reveal and copy controls beside a masked token.
account-col-issued: Table column header for token issue date.
account-col-last-used: Table column header for last token use date.
account-col-never-used: Cell value when a token has never been used.
account-col-application: Table column header for OAuth application name.
account-col-consumer-key: Table column header for OAuth client ID (truncated in prototype).
account-col-grants: Table column header for granted permissions summary.
account-col-registered: Table column header for consumer registration date.
account-col-actions: Table column header for row actions (manage link and remove button).
account-delete-token-button: Button label to delete a token row from the prototype list only (not revocation on Wikimedia's Meta-Wiki).
account-row-actions-menu-aria: Accessible name for the icon-only row actions MenuButton (ellipsis).
account-developer-tokens-help-before: Text before the documentation link, appended after the developer-token guidance paragraph (e.g. “Learn more in ”).
account-developer-tokens-help-after: Closing punctuation after the documentation link in the developer tokens learn-more line (e.g. “.”).
account-oauth-tokens-help-before: Text before the documentation link, appended after the OAuth application guidance paragraph (e.g. “Learn more in ”).
account-oauth-tokens-help-after: Closing punctuation after the documentation link in the OAuth learn-more line (e.g. “.”).
account-adjust-scope-link: Link to manage OAuth consumer settings on Wikimedia's Meta-Wiki (nice-to-have scope changes).
account-sign-out-button: Button label to end the prototype session.
account-external-link-aria: Accessible label for external links; $1 is the visible link text.
account-resources-nav-label: Accessible name for the documentation links region on the account page.
account-learn-more-oauth-link: Link label to OAuth/For Developers on mediawiki.org.
account-learn-more-owner-only-link: Link label to owner-only consumer documentation.
content-external-link-label: Accessible label for the external-link icon appended to links that go to external sites. Indicates to screen reader users that the link leaves the site.
search-results-locale-heading: Heading shown above a group of search results in a specific language. $1 is the translated name of the language (e.g. 'French'). Use {{bidi:$1}} for BiDi isolation.
search-no-locale-results: Message shown when no results are found for the query in the active locale. $1 is the translated language name; $2 is the user's search query. Use {{bidi:$1}} and {{bidi:$2}} for BiDi isolation.
search-all-languages-cta: Button label to expand the search view across all supported languages.
content-page-nav-label: Accessible name for the prev/next page navigation landmark at the bottom of content pages.
search-no-results-any-language: Message shown in all-locales mode when no results are found in any language. $1 is the user's search query. Use {{bidi:$1}} for BiDi isolation.
content-heading-anchor-label: Accessible label for the anchor link icon shown on hover next to each heading in content pages. Reads aloud when keyboard users focus the link.
